description:
Your personal research assistant

Zotero is a free, easy-to-use tool to help you collect, organize, annotate, cite, and share research.
- Fixed crash inserting rich text on LibreOffice 25.2+
- Fixed repeated file sync downloads in some situations
- Faster citation style loading
- Don't merge attachments into a missing snapshot attachment
- Fixed Google Docs integration breaking when canceling Edit Bibliograpy
- Fixed “Copy Collection” context-menu option creating a copy in the same subcollection when copying to library root
- Fixed failure to open new tabs after closing a tab immediately after an operation
- Miscellaneous bibliographic output fixes
  - Fixed percent-encoding of DOIs prepended with “https://doi.org/” in references
  - Fixed incorrectly title-cased volume titles in non-English languages
